narrative:
Precinct Brunswick City 2-A (precinct in Medina County) has 833 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
